name: matreshka-agent
description: Orchestrates coding-agent work from design and planning through tested implementation, review, verification, and handoff.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, implement, review, and verify coding work.
interface.longDescription: A permission-aware controller and nine portable skills for coding-agent workflows from discovery through verified handoff.
defaultPrompt: Help me design and plan this coding task before implementation.
Run this coding task with the balanced profile and verify the result.
Audit this change and report evidence without modifying files.
